summary: WeakMap-based handler tracking in plugin transport preload may collide if same handler registered on multiple channels
details: In packages/desktop/src/preload/index.ts, the pluginWrapped WeakMap keys by handler function only. If the same handler function object is registered on two different channels, the second registration overwrites the first's wrapper. pluginOff could then remove the wrong listener. Fix: key by channel+handler tuple (e.g., Map<string, WeakMap<...>>).
